settings.account.title: Account settings
settings.appearance.chatMessageFontSizeD: Controls user message text and Agent reply body size.
settings.appearance.desc: Manage page language and display preferences.
settings.appearance.title: General
settings.onboarding.replayUpgradeDesc: Open the version update page and check the latest release notes.
settings.onboarding.resetGuideDesc: Clear only guide progress and show the first-run guide again.
settings.onboarding.title: Guides
settings.archivedSessions.deleteConfirmD: "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.archivedSessions.desc: Review archived sessions for the current project and restore or permanently delete them.
settings.archivedSessions.title: Archived sessions
settings.privacy.title: Privacy and diagnostics
settings.privacy.desc: Control product analytics and error reporting independently.
settings.privacy.analytics.title: Product analytics
settings.privacy.analytics.desc: Share pseudonymous usage events to help improve OpenTeams. The installation identifier is stable and derived from local device and user information. Changes take effect immediately.
settings.privacy.errorReporting.title: Error reporting
settings.privacy.errorReporting.desc: Send crashes and technical diagnostics to Sentry, including the installation ID and, when configured, your GitHub username and email. This is independent from product analytics and requires an app restart after changing it.
settings.privacy.errorReporting.restartN: Restart OpenTeams for the error reporting change to take effect.
settings.privacy.collectedData: Product analytics includes event types; a stable pseudonymous installation ID derived from local device and user information; session, run, workflow execution, plan, step, agent, and skill IDs; run and workflow states and stable error codes; bucketed counts and durations; and app version.
settings.privacy.excludedData: Product analytics never includes message or file contents, prompts, file paths, raw output, stack traces, or secret values. Error reports are separate and can include stack traces and technical diagnostics.
settings.notifications.agentActivity.des: When an agent completes a task or encounters a failure
settings.notifications.inbox.desc: Choose which event sources appear as unread reminders.
settings.notifications.inboxSources.desc: Choose which event types appear as unread reminders in the notification center.
settings.notifications.inbox.title: Notification center
settings.notifications.newMessage.desc: When an agent sends a new reply
settings.notifications.newMessage.title: New message
settings.notifications.soundEnabled.desc: Play the selected sound when OpenTeams sends an alert.
settings.notifications.soundSelect.desc: Choose the alert sound. Turning sound off keeps this selection for later.
settings.notifications.soundSelect.title: Notification audio
settings.notifications.source.approval.d: Show tool and permission requests waiting for approval.
settings.notifications.source.chatMessag: Show new agent replies in the notification center.
settings.notifications.source.failure.de: Show failed runs, workflows, and cleanup tasks.
settings.notifications.source.workflowAc: Show workflow steps waiting for input, review, or approval.
settings.notifications.source.worktree.d: Show session worktree conflicts and cleanup issues.
settings.notifications.system.desc: Control operating system banners and the sound played for alerts.
settings.notifications.system.title: System notifications
settings.notifications.systemBanner.desc: Show an operating system notification banner when OpenTeams sends an alert.
Allow system notifications in your browser or operating system settings, then turn this on again.
System notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.notifications.workflowStatus.de: When a running workflow step changes status
settings.providers.noConnected: No providers are connected. Add a provider to enable routing.
settings.storage.worktreeSessionsDirDesc: Choose where isolated session worktree folders are created.
settings.storage.worktreeSessionsDirSele: The file picker did not return a local folder path. Enter the path manually.
settings.shortcuts.desc: Standard key triggers integrated internally for quick directions navigation.
settings.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
